headline: Woman's 'De-Influencing' Video Accidentally Made Everyone Buy The Product She Was Criticizing
summary: The 'don't buy this' lipstick sold out in 4 hours. The paradox of de-influencing strikes again.
fullBody: Jessica Deinfluencer posted a video titled 'don't buy this overpriced lipstick.' Her followers immediately bought it. 'I said don't,' Jessica said, confused. The lipstick sold out. Jessica has now posted a 'de-de-influencing' video telling people to 'actually not buy the thing I told you not to buy.' It sold out again. Jessica has retired from de-influencing. She's now a brand ambassador for the lipstick. 'The irony is not lost on me,' she said.
